hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '(.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath) // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) cd /Users/s24393/trung/legal-guard-PH && uv run ruff check "$f" 2>&1 || true ;; esac

cd /Users/s24393/trung/legal-guard-PH || exit 0; [ "$(jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false' 2>/dev/null)" = "true" ] && exit 0; QWEN_API_KEY="" GEMINI_API_KEY="" uv run ruff check . || exit 2; if git status --porcelain | grep -q '[.]py'; then QWEN_API_KEY="" GEMINI_API_KEY="" uv run pytest -q || exit 2; fi
